productDescription: Multi-tenant insurance policy management platform with Staff, Agent, and Client portals. RBAC enforced; agents see only their own data.

technicalSpecs.stack: React 19, Vite, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL (Drizzle), Passport auth

functionalRequirements: FR1: Staff can sign in with Google and access dashboard, policies, clients, claims, finance, reports, settings
FR2: Agent can sign in with email/password and see only own clients, policies, leads, commissions, and reports
FR3: Client can sign in with policy number and password and view policies, pay premiums, view documents, submit claims and feedback
FR4: All lists, dashboards, and reports must respect RBAC (agents see only their data)
FR5: Policies support full lifecycle: inactive, active, grace, lapsed, cancelled; status history and reinstatement
FR6: Payments can be recorded and allocated; client can initiate premium payment
FR7: Claims can be created, linked to policy, and have documents attached
FR8: Tenant whitelabel (name, logo) applies when enabled; default is POL263 branding
FR9: Join and registration flows support referral codes and policy claim
FR10: Settings (tenant, users, branches, logo, signature) save and take effect
userStories: As staff I can log in with Google so that I access the staff dashboard
As staff I can create and edit policies so that client coverage is managed
As staff I can view reports and export CSV so that I can analyze data
As agent I can log in with email/password so that I access my scoped dashboard
As agent I see only my clients and policies so that data is RBAC-compliant
As agent I can copy my referral link so that clients can sign up with my code
As client I can log in with policy number and password so that I see my dashboard
As client I can pay my premium so that my policy stays in good standing
As client I can view my documents and submit claims so that I manage my coverage
As platform owner I can switch tenants so that I manage multiple organizations
keyFlows: Home -> Staff login (Google) -> Dashboard -> Policies / Clients / Claims / Finance / Reports / Settings
Home -> Agent login (email/password) -> Dashboard (agent-scoped) -> My Clients / Policies / Commissions
Home -> Client login (policy + password) -> Client dashboard -> Pay / Documents / Claims / Feedback
Join (with ref) -> Register -> Product/branch selection -> Client details -> Dependents -> Payment -> Policy created
acceptanceCriteria: Login flows for staff, agent, and client work and redirect to correct dashboard
Dashboard and all reports show agent-scoped data when user is agent
Policy CRUD, status lifecycle, and PDF generation work
Payment recording and client payment flow work
Claims creation and document upload work
Settings and whitelabel save and apply
No uncaught errors that break the page; error boundary does not auto-clear
